rows.label: qev042202_MSG0001
rows.name:
Thou hast done well to defeat
mine incarnation, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0002
rows.name:
I shall grant a trial unto
thee, who shows promise, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0003
rows.name:
This trial shall push thee
to the extremes of hardship.
It shall break thy spirit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0004
rows.name:
Knowing this, dost thou still wish
to be granted the trial, mo...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_JNK0010
rows.name: Accept

rows.label: qev042202_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask to be granted the trial.

rows.label: qev042202_JNK0020
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: qev042202_SEL0021
rows.name: Say you do not wish to be granted any trial.

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0005
rows.name:
Very well... then I shall
bestow it upon thee, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0006
rows.name:
I am satisfied to hear
such a fine answer, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0007
rows.name:
Eh...!? Wait just a moment, mo!
If you take the trial, you can
obtain amazing power, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0008
rows.name:
Besides, I will have been defeated
for absolutely nothing, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0009
rows.name:
I will absolutely not
allow such a choice, mo!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0010
rows.name:
Mongara~ Hengara~ Fungara
mongara momomomo~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0011
rows.name: Now, wilt thou undertake the trial, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_JNK0030
rows.name: Accept

rows.label: qev042202_SEL0031
rows.name: Say you gladly accept.

rows.label: qev042202_JNK0040
rows.name: Accept

rows.label: qev042202_SEL0041
rows.name: Say you humbly accept.

rows.label: qev042202_JNK0050
rows.name: Accept

rows.label: qev042202_SEL0051
rows.name: Say you eagerly accept.

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0012
rows.name:
Umu, thou wishest to undertake it that
much, mo! Thou art a splendid fellow, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0013
rows.name: Humu! That is a modest answer, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0014
rows.name:
Oho. It seems thou wilt show
me a burning spirit, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0015
rows.name:
The trial is to refine this gemstone, which
records the origin of the Nopon, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0016
rows.name:
If thou receivest the blessings of the
spirits scattered across the lands, the
gemstone shall naturally shine, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_JNK0060
rows.name: Inquire about Origins

rows.label: qev042202_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask in detail about the origin of the Nopon.

rows.label: qev042202_JNK0070
rows.name: Inquire about Spirits

rows.label: qev042202_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask if there are other spirits.

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0017
rows.name:
It is said that the reason Nopon
exist in this world shall be unraveled
by polishing this gemstone, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0018
rows.name:
It should contain the truth of the
Nopon that even I do not know, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0019
rows.name:
In this land of Mira, there are three
spirits other than myself, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0020
rows.name:
All possess power equal to
or greater than mine, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0021
rows.name:
If all are gathered and exert
their true power, it would be
enough to overturn the world, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0022
rows.name:
I shall bestow this
gemstone upon thee, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0023
rows.name:
The first spirit should be at the Blue
Hole in the Valley of Oblivion, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0024
rows.name:
The second spirit is at the
Old Ceremonial Hollow in the
Black Steel Continent, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0025
rows.name:
The third spirit is at the Kuei Cave
in the White Tree Continent, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0026
rows.name:
Return here once thou hast received
the blessings of all the spirits,
mo. Do thy best, go go, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0027
rows.name:
Hast thou finished receiving the
blessings, mo? Show me the gemstone, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0028
rows.name:
Ooh... The worn-out gemstone
is shining... I can see
something... I can see it, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0029
rows.name:
This is... Ancient
Nopon writing, mo...!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0030
rows.name: My word... Oho... Hmm... Aha... Ah...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_JNK0100
rows.name: Press[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_SEL0101
rows.name: Pester him to tell you quickly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_JNK0110
rows.name: Observe[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_SEL0111
rows.name: Point out that he does not seem very happy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0031
rows.name:
Please stop looking at me with
those sparkling eyes, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0032
rows.name: I am incredibly... sorry, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0033
rows.name: Thou... thou hast figured it out, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0034
rows.name:
It was not the content I
was hoping for, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0035
rows.name:
I thought it was written...
how Nopon were born into this
world, but I was wrong, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0036
rows.name:
"First! To be considered
cute by all forms of life!"[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0037
rows.name:
"First! To achieve this, always
maintain your fluffy fluffiness!"[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0038
rows.name:
"First! To become fluffy, drink
Keppo-carrot powder every day!"[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0039
rows.name:
...There are about 50 lines of this
kind of stuff crammed in there, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0040
rows.name:
This is information that only Napopon
would rejoice over, mo... It is so
absurd it makes me want to cry, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0041
rows.name:
This merely exposed that the ancestor
or whoever left this behind was an
idiot, mo. Forget it, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0042
rows.name: ...Let us pull ourselves together, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0043
rows.name:
The part about granting you the power of
the spirits was true, so take this, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0044
rows.name:
Mongara~ Hengara~ Fungara
mongara momomomo~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0045
rows.name: Yes, ta-daaa, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0046
rows.name:
It might look like a cheap toy,
but it is incredibly strong, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0047
rows.name:
It is the sword of the spirits that
could cleave even me, so please do
not mistake who you use it on, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0048
rows.name:
Well then... I have
fulfilled my role, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0049
rows.name:
We will probably never meet again,
but do thy best or whatever, mo~...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0050
rows.name:
Ah, I heard absolutely everything the
other spirits were saying about me, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042202_MSG0051
rows.name:
I will punish them with my ultimate
"Divine Nopopopopon Slash X", mo![ST:wait ]
